_comment: Publish this file to https://raw.githubusercontent.com/abdumka/quran-app/main/update.json (the repo must be public). The app reads it on startup and from Settings > التحقق من وجود تحديث, and compares 'version'/'build' against the installed app. Set them to the LATEST released version: users on an older build get the update prompt; users already on it do not. Edit 'changes' for the changelog. Set 'mandatory': true to force the update (hides the 'Later' button and shows it every launch until updated). Per-platform keys (android/ios) override the shared top-level values; omit them to use the shared ones.
changes: إمكانية استقبال إشعار عند توفر تحديث جديد.
تحديث رابط واتساب (رابط المجموعة الجديد للنقاش).
